introSection: Beach Rescue Racer is a Zierer roller coaster located at SeaWorld San Antonio in San Antonio, Texas, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
In the fall of 2024, it was announced that Sesame Street Bay of Play would be replaced with a new Rescue Jr. area in 2025, which would include a new roller coaster.

The ride started testing in February 2025. The ride opened with the Rescue Jr. area on March 8.

fullText:
Beach Rescue Racer is a Zierer roller coaster located at SeaWorld San Antonio in San Antonio, Texas, USA.

In the fall of 2024, it was announced that Sesame Street Bay of Play would be replaced with a new Rescue Jr. area in 2025, which would include a new roller coaster.

The ride started testing in February 2025. The ride opened with the Rescue Jr. area on March 8.
